name: Divinit Pastels
recipeInstructions:
1. Lovely candies flavored and colored with fruit-flavored gelatin.
2. Mix sugar, corn syrup, and water; bring to a boil over low heat, stirring to dissolve sugar.
3. Continue boiling, stirring occasionally, until a small amount of syrup forms a hard ball in cold water (or 252°F on a candy thermometer), about 15 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
5. Add Jell-O, 1 tablespoon at a time, and beat until the mixture will form stiff peaks.
6. Pour syrup into a thin stream over the egg white mixture while beating constantly.
7. Continue beating until the mixture holds its shape and loses its gloss (about 10 minutes with an electric mixer).
8. Add nuts; quickly pour into a well-greased 9-inch square pan or drop by teaspoons onto wax paper to dry.
9. Let stand in the pan until firm enough to handle, about 10 minutes.
10. Cut into 8 strips and then cut each into 10 to 12 pieces.
11. Roll each piece in coconut again.
12. Allow to dry for about 2 hours before storing in a covered container.
Makes about 7 dozen candies. If the candy becomes too stiff during beating, add a few drops of hot water.
